ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "doy" INTEGER /* Day of the year (1-366) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Average temperature for the day */,
  "maxt" REAL /* Maximum temperature for the day */,
  "mint" REAL /* Minimum temperature for the day */,
  "rad" REAL /* Solar radiation for the day */,
  "psid" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure for the day */,
  "ca" INTEGER /* Carbon dioxide concentration for the day */,
  "rtot" REAL /* Total rainfall for the day */,
  "nit" REAL /* Nitrogen content for the day */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of data collection */,
  "data_source" INTEGER /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual entry) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_validity" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is valid for use */,
  "data_remarks" TEXT /* Any remarks or notes about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was established */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., sensor, manual entry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., sensor, satellite, manual) */,
  "source_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data source */,
  "source_precision" REAL /* Precision of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., temperature, radiation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Extended description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data category */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data value */,
  "value_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the data value */,
  "value_source" TEXT /* Source of the value (e.g., sensor, model) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "quality_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "quality_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the quality metric */,
  "quality_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the file for integrity checks */,
  "file_storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the file (e.g., cloud, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., calibration date, sensor type) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., technical, descriptive) */,
  "metadata_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access (e.g., New York, USA) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the data model or forecasting tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., weather, climate) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data model used */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the model was run */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the model run */,
  "output_file" TEXT /* File path to the model output */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the model run (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "run_duration" REAL /* Duration of the model run in seconds */,
  "run_output_size" REAL /* Size of the model output file in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES data_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_model_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date of the association */,
  "association_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the association */,
  "association_status" TEXT /* Status of the association (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_model_associations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_model_associations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
